channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Barry Manilow reflects on life, career, health and identity at 82
item.description: Barry Manilow, the 82-year-old American singer and performer, discusses his life and career in a wide-ranging interview following recent health challenges and continued touring plans. Earlier in the y...

item.title: Brad Pitt, Cher, Madonna and Other Celebrities Discussed for High-Profile Age-Gap Relationships
item.description: The article examines several celebrity couples with significant age differences, focusing on Hollywood stars and musicians who are in relationships with much younger partners. It begins with actor Bra...

item.title: The Mandalorian and Grogu posts weakest Star Wars box office opening in Disney era
item.description: The film The Mandalorian and Grogu has debuted at the box office with the lowest opening weekend of any Star Wars film released under Disney’s ownership of the franchise. Despite topping the global bo...

item.title: Rare 1987 LIFE Magazine Photoshoot Showcases Alyssa Milano at the Height of Her Teen Stardom
item.description: A recently highlighted collection of photographs revisits actress Alyssa Milano during a 1987 photoshoot for LIFE magazine, capturing the young television star at the peak of her popularity in the lat...

item.title: French Painter Jean Geoffroy’s Realistic Depictions of Childhood and Public Education
item.description: The article highlights the life and artistic legacy of French painter and illustrator Jean Geoffroy (1853–1924), also known by the pseudonym Geo. Geoffroy became widely recognized during the French Th...

item.title: Rep. Ro Khanna Criticizes Vice President JD Vance Over Defense of Trump Administration Funding and Policies
item.description: Representative Ro Khanna, a Democrat from California, sharply criticized Vice President JD Vance during an appearance on NBC’s “Meet the Press,” focusing on Vance’s defense of President Donald Trump’s...

item.title: APC Endorses Tinubu for 2027 as Debate Grows Over Credibility of Primary Vote Figures
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don secure overwhelming victory for the All Progressives Congress (APC) presidential primary ahead of the 2027 general election after polling 10,999,162 votes, while his only cha...

item.title: Former AFL player and coach Neale Daniher dies after long battle with motor neurone disease
item.description: Former AFL player, coach and celebrated fundraiser Neale Daniher has died in Melbourne at the age of 65 after a decade-long battle with motor neurone disease (MND). Diagnosed in 2013, Daniher made his...

item.title: Sarah Omega’s Initiative Supporting Obstetric Fistula Survivors and Maternal Health in Western Kenya
item.description: This news story focuses on Sarah Omega, an obstetric fistula survivor who has dedicated her life to supporting women affected by the condition in Kenya, especially in Western and Rift Valley regions. ...

item.title: Kerala appointment of former Chief Electoral Officer as CM secretary triggers political controversy
item.description: A political controversy has erupted in Kerala after Dr Rathan U Kelkar, a 2003-batch Indian Administrative Service (IAS) officer who recently served as the state’s Chief Electoral Officer, was appoint...

item.title: Mid-20th Century Christmas Gathering Photos Highlight Vintage Holiday Traditions
item.description: The article presents a nostalgic look at Christmas celebrations during the mid-20th century, particularly the 1950s and 1960s, through a collection of vintage photographs. It emphasizes the warmth and...

item.title: The psychology behind ‘nine-ender’ birthdays and life changes
item.description: This article explores the psychological phenomenon known as ‘nine-enders’, the years in which people are approaching a new decade of age (such as 29, 39, 49, or 59). Research suggests that individuals...

item.title: Indian-origin mother and son from Haryana elected mayors in UK councils
item.description: A remarkable achievement has been recorded by a family originally from Haryana, India, as a mother and son duo have been elected as mayors in the United Kingdom within a span of one week. The family, ...

item.title: WE Seniors to Host Free Older, Bolder, Better Exhibition and Symposium at River Cree Resort
item.description: The Westend Seniors Activity Centre (WE Seniors) is promoting its 29th annual Older, Bolder, Better Exhibition and Symposium, a free community event aimed at supporting and engaging older adults in Al...

item.title: Johannesburg mayoral race highlights growing influence of national politics in local elections
item.description: The article argues that South Africa’s municipal elections are increasingly being shaped by national political dynamics instead of the local service delivery issues they are meant to address. S’thembi...

item.title: Study finds beetroot juice may reduce blood pressure in older adults after two weeks
item.description: A new study from researchers at the University of Exeter suggests that drinking nitrate-rich beetroot juice may help lower blood pressure in older adults, potentially through changes in the oral micro...

item.title: Grace Nancy Dela Rosa appeals to Philippine courts to prevent ICC transfer of Senator Bato Dela Rosa
item.description: Grace Nancy Dela Rosa, wife of Senator Ronald “Bato” Dela Rosa, appealed to the Philippine judiciary to stop any move that would transfer the senator to The Hague to face proceedings before the Intern...

item.title: Three Former Tinubu Ministers Lose APC Primaries Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Three former ministers under President Bola Tinubu administration don lose their APC primary elections after dem resign from cabinet to pursue elective positions ahead of the 2027 general elections. T...

item.title: US and Iran move closer to agreement as Trump warns Tehran over nuclear weapons
item.description: Negotiations between the United States and Iran have reportedly advanced significantly, with officials suggesting that a potential agreement aimed at de-escalating conflict and restoring stability in ...

item.title: BIR clarifies CETI requirement for annual income tax returns of registered business enterprises
item.description: The Bureau of Internal Revenue (BIR) has clarified the requirement for Registered Business Enterprises (RBEs) to submit the Certificate of Entitlement to Tax Incentives (CETI) as an attachment to thei...
